zh.Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire: 英國賀福爾古德里奇古德里奇 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere於1383年9月23日出生在英國賀福爾古德里奇古德里奇 卡素時，她的父親Sir Richard Talbot22歲，母親Ankaret le Strange22歲。她於1397年與Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1433年4月13日在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓享年49歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere was born on 23 September 1383, in Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Talbot, was 22 and her mother, Ankaret le Strange, was 22. She married Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton in 1397, in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 13 April 1433, in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere est née le 23 septembre 1383, à Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Talbot, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Ankaret le Strange, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton en 1397, à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 13 avril 1433, à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.goodrich castle, goodrich, herefordshire: Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere am 23. September 1383 in Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Talbot 22 und ihre Mutter Ankaret le Strange 22. Sie hat 1397 in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 13. April 1433 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton nel 1397, nel Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemereが1383年9月23日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアグドリチグドリチ カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Talbotは22歳，母Ankaret le Strangeは22歳であった。1397年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンでSir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Nortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1433年4月13日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンで49歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンにて埋葬された。

ko.goodrich castle, goodrich, herefordshire: 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 구드리치 구드리치 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere(이)가 1383년 9월 23일 영국 허퍼드실르 구드리치 구드리치 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Talbot(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ankaret le Strange(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1397년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에서 Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1433년 4월 13일 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere nasceu em 23 de setembro de 1383, em Goodrich Castle, Goodrich, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Talbot, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Ankaret le Strange, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton em 1397, em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 13 de abril de 1433, em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.goodrich castle, goodrich, herefordshire: гудрич кастл, гудрич, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere родилась 23 сентября 1383 г. в местности гудрич кастл, гудрич, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Talbot было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Ankaret le Strange, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton в 1397 г. в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 13 апреля 1433 г. в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton en 1397, en Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
